gpt55_review_summary: Reviewer found two blockers: the draft PR evidence sidecar was incomplete, and preflight validation accepted records with ok=false. This update completes PR #313 evidence and makes validate_document_kv_vllm_layer_mapping_record reject unsafe failed mappings.
what_changed: Added a vLLM layer-name mapping diagnostic that serializes how Cachet maps registered vLLM KV cache tensors to document-KV payload layer indices, wired provider registration to use the same validator, and made validation fail when the diagnostic ok flag is false.
why: Before launching provider-backed native probes on g5/g6, the target runtime needs a preflightable record proving real vLLM layer names can be mapped safely instead of relying on insertion order or silent best-effort behavior.
